raw_output:
import requests

def test_unauthorized_parse():
    """Test that Reducto returns 401 for invalid Bearer token."""
    url = "https://api.example.com/parse"
    headers = {"Authorization": "Bearer totally_invalid_key_xyz"}
    response = requests.post(url, headers=headers)
    assert response.status_code == 401

def test_not_found_parse():
    """Test that Reducto returns 404 for non-existent input URL."""
    url = "https://api.example.com/parse"
    data = {"input_url": "https://this-does-not-exist.example.com/fake.pdf"}
    response = requests.post(url, json=data)
    assert response.status_code == 404

def test_bad_request_extract():
    """Test that Reducto returns 400 for malformed JSON (missing closing brace)."""
    url = "https://api.example.com/extract"
    # Invalid JSON due to missing closing brace in the outer object
    data = '{"key": "value"'
    headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
    response = requests.post(url, data=data, headers=headers)
    assert response.status_code == 400
